attr.title: BRKCHRD
attr.desc: Chord-performance synth with corrected extensions, sixteen musical presets, deterministic or live voice leading and instrument-aware voicings.
attr.inst: TrimUI Brick / Knulli. L1 cycles CHORD/SOUND/PERF FX, L2 holds alternate layers, R1/R2 select chord banks and Select opens Settings. VOICE LEAD and PERF FX can be enabled independently.
